headlines.title: Fake Trump and Oprah ads fuel a wave of Medicare scams on Facebook, report says
headlines.description: Meta, the parent of Facebook and Instagram, is failing to stop scammers who repeatedly buy ads on the platforms to target seniors with scams, a new report says.

headlines.title: Most U.S. doctors are quietly using this AI tool. Few patients know about it.
headlines.description: OpenEvidence, an AI-powered medical search tool, has become a fast friend to America’s doctors and is now used by nearly two-thirds of physicians.

headlines.title: Sam Altman testifies at trial that Elon Musk ‘tried to kill’ OpenAI twice
headlines.description: Altman is defending himself against Musk’s claims that he’s trying to enrich himself at the expense of OpenAI’s original nonprofit mission.

headlines.title: Authorities say she asked ChatGPT about mixing alcohol and meds. Then, two men turned up dead.
headlines.description: Kim So-young is accused of asking ChatGPT for lethal dosing advice before giving three men benzodiazepine-laced drinks. Two died.

headlines.title: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella testifies in OpenAI trial
headlines.description: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella took the witness stand in a trial about control of the artificial intelligence startup OpenAI.

headlines.title: Lawsuit says ChatGPT told FSU shooter that targeting children would bring more attention
headlines.description: OpenAI faces a lawsuit alleging that ChatGPT played a role in a mass shooting at Florida State University in April 2025 that left two people dead.

headlines.title: President Trump arrives in China for high-stakes summit with Xi
headlines.description: President Trump was greeted in Beijing with a welcome ceremony ahead of his two-day summit with Chinese President Xi.

headlines.title: How Trump's Summit in China Will Differ From His 2017 Visit
headlines.description: NBC Nightly News anchor Tom Llamas joins TODAY from Beijing to talk about what to expect from President Donald Trump’s high-stakes summit with China’s President Xi Jinping. He breaks down how the visit will be different from his visit nine years ago in 2017, why Trump is expected to ask for help in negotiating a Strait of Hormuz deal and what to make of the high-profile guest list that includes tech leaders Elon Musk and Tim Cook.

headlines.title: Chinese EVs take the world by storm — except in the U.S.
headlines.description: China loves electric cars: making them, driving them and selling them to the rest of the world.

headlines.title: UCF Commencement Speaker Booed Over AI Comments
headlines.description: The debate over artificial intelligence and its role in the arts is back in the spotlight with Demi Moore now urging Hollywood to work with the emerging technology. It comes as a clip is going viral of the commencement speaker at the University of Central Florida being booed for saying, “The rise of artificial intelligence is the next Industrial Revolution.” NBC’s Stephanie Gosk reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: 3,800 Waymos recalled for issue that lets them drive into standing water on higher speed roadways
headlines.description: Self-driving car company Waymo issued a voluntary software recall that impacted thousands of vehicles. It was related to concerns about the vehicles' ability to handle flooded streets. NBC News’ Ryan Chandler reports.

headlines.title: Elon Musk's lawyer accuses OpenAI CEO of putting profit over people
headlines.description: The legal team for Elon Musk has said that OpenAI's Sam Altman placed profit incentives above the company's mission statement to work for the public good in a trial catching the attention of the tech world and beyond.
